post.description:
流式对话接口 (Server-Sent Events)。

请求:
    POST /api/chat/completions
    body: { "message": "你好", "conversation_id": null }

响应:
    text/event-stream
    data: {"type": "content", "delta": "你"}
    ...

ApiResponse.title: ApiResponse

BadCase.title: BadCase
BadCase.description: Answers marked as poor quality (e.g. from user thumbs-down or low eval scores), used for fine-tuning or prompt fixing.

EvaluationReport.title: EvaluationReport
EvaluationReport.description: Results of an evaluation run on a specific EvaluationSet.

EvaluationSet.title: EvaluationSet
EvaluationSet.description: A collection of ground truth Q&A pairs for evaluating a Knowledge Base.

FineTuningItem.title: FineTuningItem
FineTuningItem.description:
Data pair for LLM fine-tuning.
Can be used to export datasets for SFT (Supervised Fine-tuning).

HITLTask.title: HITLTask
HITLTask.description: Queue for Human-in-the-Loop review of ambiguous or low-confidence data.
